title: Guacamole

ingredients.title: Ingredients (Yield: About 2 cups)
items: 1–2 serrano or jalapeño chiles, deseeded and finely minced
1 medium ripe tomato, deseeded and finely diced
Optional: 1/4 tsp ground cumin for depth

instruction.title: Prepare the Avocados
steps: Cut avocados in half, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl.
Mash using fork or potato masher to desired texture (chunky or smooth).

instruction.title: Mix Aromatics
steps: Add onion, chiles, tomato, and cilantro to mashed avocado.
Gently fold everything together without overmixing.

instruction.title: Season
steps: Add lime juice, salt, pepper, and optional cumin.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.

instruction.title: Rest & Serve
steps: Let sit for 5–10 minutes for flavors to blend.

chefTips: Use ripe Hass avocados for best creaminess.
Balance lime carefully to avoid overpowering flavor.
Serve fresh to prevent browning and oxidation.
Optional garnish: olive oil drizzle or cilantro topping.
